description: A new car owner wants to activate the free trial for their in-car Wi-Fi hotspot.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and vehicle, and verify eligibility for the Wi-Fi trial.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the vehicle is eligible for a 3-month/3GB free trial.

nodes.task_description: Explain the terms of the trial (duration, data cap) and what happens when it expires.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the trial terms and conditions.

nodes.task_description: Activate the Wi-Fi hotspot service on the customer's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully activates the service, and it becomes available in the vehicle.
